ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state name */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state (e.g., West, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the state */,
  "education_spending" REAL /* Annual education spending per capita */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment (e.g., State Standardized Test) */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level for which the assessment is designed */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the assessment (e.g., Math, Science) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., standardized, formative) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the assessment (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the students are located */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment taken */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the students are located */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the students are located */,
  "percentage_tested" REAL /* Percentage of students tested in the state */,
  "avg_composite_score" REAL /* Average composite score of students */,
  "avg_english_score" REAL /* Average English score of students */,
  "avg_math_score" REAL /* Average Math score of students */,
  "avg_reading_score" REAL /* Average Reading score of students */,
  "avg_science_score" REAL /* Average Science score of students */,
  "performance_trend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance trend record */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the state/district/school */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* Rate of improvement in performance over the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_performance_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_trend_id") REFERENCES performance_trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state in which the district is located */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the district */,
  "students_per_teacher" REAL /* Ratio of students to teachers in the district */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school belongs to */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal of the school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the school (e.g., state, federal, private) */,
  "student_diversity" REAL /* Diversity index of the student population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the teacher works */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Type of certification the teacher holds */,
  "professional_development_hours" INTEGER /* Number of professional development hours completed */,
  "classroom_size" INTEGER /* Average number of students in the teacher's classes */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student attends */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "parental_education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the student's parents */,
  "free_reduced_lunch" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student qualifies for free or reduced-price lunch */,
  "special_needs" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student has special educational needs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessments" (
  "student_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student assessment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student taking the assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment taken */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was taken */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the student is located */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the student is located */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who administered the assessment */,
  "retake_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the student has taken the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES student_demographics ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment being tracked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "avg_score" REAL /* Average score across all students for the assessment in that year */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the trend is being tracked */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the trend is being tracked */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* Rate of improvement in performance over the previous year */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., year-over-year, longitudinal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_trends_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_trends_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_trends_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., assessment data, student data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, educator, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
